prestazioni: Engine: RB26DETT Proto (pre-production) with forged internals including Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 2.8L stroker crankshaft for a 2.8L displacement. Turbocharged with a Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbo (84mm compressor, 64mm turbine) on a custom Tomei 4-1 equal-length exhaust manifold, paired with a Tomei M82 cams (272° duration, 10.5mm lift) and Tomei Type-S valve springs for high-RPM stability.

Fuel System: Full Radium Engineering fuel system upgrade including dual Radium Engineering 400LPH in-tank fuel pumps, Radium Engineering fuel pressure regulator (set to 5.5 bar base pressure), and ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min) with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel mapping and ignition control. Custom -AN6 fuel lines with Earl's UltraPro hose ends and a Radium Engineering surge tank for consistent fuel delivery under lateral G-forces.

Drivetrain & Suspension: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way) in the rear differential with a Nismo 6-speed close-ratio transmission (R34 GT-R ratios) and a Tilton twin-disc carbon clutch. Suspension features Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (custom valving for Proto chassis geometry) with Swift Springs (12kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) and Cusco front and rear strut tower bars. Braking system includes AP Racing CP8660 front calipers (6-piston) with 380mm 2-piece rotors and AP Racing CP5350 rear calipers (4-piston) with 356mm rotors, paired with Ferodo DS3000 brake pads and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Body Kit: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders to accommodate 11.5-inch wide front and 12.5-inch wide rear wheels. Front bumper features a custom carbon fiber splitter with integrated canards (3-piece design) and a Veilside Fortune 03 carbon fiber hood with a central vent for heat extraction.

Aero & Lighting: Custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (carbon fiber, 3-stage design) with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5-inch titanium exhaust tips (custom fabrication by HKS Hi-Power). Lighting includes custom Hella 90mm headlight projectors with Osram D1S 66240 bulbs and a full LED conversion for taillights and side markers (custom housings by VLED). Carbon fiber side skirts with integrated LED turn signals and a custom carbon fiber rear wing (Rocket Bunny GT wing, 1800mm width, 3D-printed adjustable mounts).

Wheels & Interior: Work Meister S1 3P wheels (18x11.5 +15 front, 18x12.5 +20 rear) with custom gold/polished finish and Toyo R888R tires (295/35/18 front, 325/30/18 rear). Interior features a full Bride Zeta III reclining bucket seat setup (custom red Alcantara with black stitching) mounted on Bride VAB-II rails, paired with a Nismo R34 GT-R steering wheel (380mm diameter) and a custom roll cage by Cusco (8-point, chromoly steel, bolt-in design with integrated harness bar). Shift knob is a custom titanium piece by Buddy Club (short throw, R34 GT-R pattern) with a Nismo R34 GT-R shift boot.
